title: Print all columns of monday board
excerpt:
Hi, 
I want to take print of all of my columns on monday board. Taking a pdf export only includes columns that are visible. Is there any efficient way of taking print of all columns? 
Thanks in advance

posts.author: sameer.javed (Sameer Javed)
